message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "ScooterOwner\nSavManager\nSavTechnicien" as User
interface Claims as Claims
boundary ClaimsService as ClaimsService
entity Claim as Claim

User -> Claims : getClaimDetail(Id)
activate Claims
Claims -> ClaimsService : getClaimDetail(Id)
activate ClaimsService
ClaimsService -> Claim : getClaimDetail(Id)
activate Claim
alt [claim is found]
  Claim --> ClaimsService : claimDetail
  deactivate Claim
  ClaimsService --> Claims : claimDetail
  deactivate ClaimsService
  Claims --> User : claimDetail
  deactivate Claims
else [claim is not found]
  Claim --> ClaimsService : claimNotFound
  deactivate Claim
  ClaimsService --> Claims : claimNotFound
  deactivate ClaimsService
  Claims --> User : claimNotFound
  deactivate Claims
end

User -> Claims : getClaimTechnicienHistory()
activate Claims
Claims -> Claims : toggleTechnicienHistory()
activate Claims
Claims --> User : technicienHistory
deactivate Claims

User -> Claims : getClaimStatusHistory()
activate Claims
Claims -> Claims : toggleStatusHistory()
activate Claims
Claims --> User : statusHistory
deactivate Claims

@enduml
